errors.camera_access: Failed to access camera. Please ensure you have granted camera access permission.
errors.camera_secure: IMPORTANT: Camera (getUserMedia) requires a secure connection (HTTPS or localhost).
errors.camera_init: Failed to initialize camera scanner container.
errors.face_api_models: Failed to load face-api models from server. Ensure model files are complete on the server.
errors.face_processing: An error occurred while processing the face image.
errors.face_not_detected: Face not detected. Please position your face right in front of the camera.

login.title: Login to Your Account
login.subtitle: Don't have an account?
login.scanner_subtitle: Align your face in the circle to authenticate
login.hero_desc: Pesu Peluh is an operational control center for supporting units, specifically designed to digitalize, integrate, and accelerate the handling of facility issues within the hospital environment.
login.error_not_match: Face not recognized or not registered.

register.title: Register Now
register.subtitle: Register to start reporting.
register.profile_photo_desc: Upload your profile photo or take a photo directly using the camera.
register.select_image_placeholder: Select image or drag & drop file here
register.face_login_desc: Register your face to login instantly next time.
register.face_success_msg: Face registered & ready to sign up!

confirm_password.title: Confirm Password
confirm_password.desc: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.desc: No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will email you a password reset link.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.desc: Enter your email and create a new secure password.

verify_email.title: Email Verification
verify_email.desc: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
verify_email.link_sent_msg: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

dashboard.desc: Pesu Peluh is an operational control center for supporting units, specifically designed to digitalize, integrate, and accelerate the handling of facility issues within the hospital environment.

settings.title: Settings
settings.edit_profile_desc: Change profile data, password, and manage your account security.
settings.dark_mode_desc: Enable dark theme for eye comfort.
settings.push_desc: Receive notifications when your report is successfully verified by admin.

profile.title: Edit Profile
profile.info_desc: Update your account's profile information and email address.
profile.resend_verification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
profile.verification_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
profile.password_desc: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
profile.delete_desc: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
profile.delete_confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.delete_confirm_desc: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

user_management.desc_admin: Manage access and accounts for users with full authority (Super Admin).
user_management.desc_management: Manage access for the board of directors, division heads, and section heads (analytic read-only access).
user_management.desc_unit_head: Manage accounts and placement for supporting unit heads (e.g. Head of IPSRS, Head of Nutrition, etc).
user_management.desc_technician: Manage access, work area placement, and active status for field technicians.
user_management.desc_room_head: Manage access and room/ward placement for Room Heads.
user_management.desc_reporter: List of staff / general reporter accounts authorized to create damage reports.
user_management.approval_desc: Review NIP and physical photo of registers before approving role and assigning unit/room.

table.empty_approvals: No new registration requests at this time.

alerts.cannot_delete_self: You cannot delete your own account!
alerts.revoke_warning: Access for {name} as {role} will be revoked permanently!
alerts.approve_warning: Registration for {name} will be approved with the specified role and placement.
alerts.reject_warning: Registration for {name} will be rejected and permanently removed from the system.

services.title: Supporting Services
services.medik_desc_landing: Covers operational reporting of medical support units consisting of Pharmacy, Radiology, Laboratory, and CSSD units.
services.medik_desc_detail: Select one of the medical support units below to start reporting.
services.non_medik_desc_landing: Covers operational reporting of non-medical support units consisting of Nutrition, Laundry, Kesling, and IPSRS units.
services.non_medik_desc_detail: Select one of the non-medical operational support units below to start reporting.

alerts.dev_text: Unit {name} is still under development for reporting system.
alerts.active_text: Redirecting you to the reporting module for {name}...

farmasi.desc: Reporting system for medicine stock, prescriptions, and pharmacy requirements.

radiologi.desc: Reporting for radiology examinations, X-ray results, CT Scan, and Ultrasound.

laboratorium.desc: Recording of blood test, urine, pathology, and clinical laboratory results.

cssd.desc: Sterilization monitoring system for medical equipment and surgical instruments.

gizi.desc: Reporting of patient meal menus, nutrition distribution, and hospital kitchen operations.

laundry.desc: Recording of medical linen circulation, washing capacity, and laundry inventory.

kesling.desc: Environmental sanitation reporting system, hazardous waste (B3) management, and water quality.

ipsrs.desc: Information system for maintenance of infrastructure, medical devices, electricity, water, and hospital facilities.

services.pilih_layanan_desc: Determine the feature module you want to report/submit.
services.kategori_di_bawah_desc: Select the specific category describing your problem.
services.kategori_empty: No damage categories available for this service.
services.form_desc: Complete the form below to submit a help ticket.
services.form_warning_html: Please select an issue category in the panel above first to enable the ticket submission form.
services.deskripsi_placeholder: Explain the details of the problem, brand/type of item, damage symptoms, or other supporting instructions...
services.empty_features_desc: We apologize, the configuration of features, workflow, and damage categories for this supporting unit has not been configured in the administrator dashboard.
services.lampiran_upload_label: Select files or drag & drop here

center.title: Report & Export Center
center.pdf_desc: Download reports in official PDF format for physical printing, hospital archiving, or external verification needs. Layout is optimized for A4 printing.
center.csv_desc: Export raw data in CSV format to easily process it further using data analysis programs such as Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, or SPSS.

detail.title: Ticket Detail & Follow-up
detail.subtitle: Report details, technician assignment, and real-time SLA monitoring.
detail.btn_arrive: I Have Arrived at Location (Response Time)
detail.pending_reason_placeholder: Explain in detail why work must be suspended...
detail.cancel_reason_placeholder: Explain why this report is cancelled (e.g. invalid report/no issue found)...
detail.arrive_instruction: Please click the button below to record the arrival response time once you arrive at the location.
detail.no_active_techs: No active technicians registered in this unit.
detail.arrived_detail_timeline: Technician arrived at location and started repairs.

categories.title: Damage Categories Management
categories.description: Configure damage categories and map them to supporting unit service features.
categories.confirm_delete_text: Damage category {name} will be deleted from master data.

supporting_units.title: Supporting Units Management
supporting_units.description: Configure parent divisions and supporting service units for the hospital.
supporting_units.empty_data: No matching division or supporting unit data found.

division.confirm_delete_text: Delete division {name}? This may affect dependent supporting units if relationship exists.
division.error_delete_text: This division cannot be deleted because it still has associated Supporting Unit data.

unit.error_delete_text: This supporting unit cannot be deleted because it is still linked to other data.

rooms.title: Rooms Management
rooms.description: Configure room master data and locations/floors in the hospital.
rooms.confirm_delete_text: Room {name} will be deleted from master data.
